h1.visual_description: Not explicitly present on this page, but inferred from footer as a potential chapter title style.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; text consists of body paragraphs and equations.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Equation numbering, positioned at the left margin preceding block math.
Currency values (USD) used within financial examples.
Percentage values used in statistical descriptions.
Probability values enclosed in parentheses within equations.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (use $$ for block equations with manual numbering, $ for inline variables and expressions)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text containing page number and chapter title (e.g., '340 | Ch. 15. Homogeneous Risk Measures') should be ignored during content extraction.
